list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant
list.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM observex.traces ORDER BY tenant_id

list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM observex.traces WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND service_name != '' ORDER BY service_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t, service_name, count() / $__interval_s AS rps FROM observex.traces WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND (service_name IN (${service:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${service:sqlstring}), '__all__')) AND start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime GROUP BY t, service_name ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS t, quantile(0.50)(duration_ns) / 1e6 AS p50, quantile(0.95)(duration_ns) / 1e6 AS p95, quantile(0.99)(duration_ns) / 1e6 AS p99 FROM observex.traces WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND (service_name IN (${service:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${service:sqlstring}), '__all__')) AND start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Error rate (% of spans with non-OK status)

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(status_code NOT IN ('OK','')) / nullIf(count(),0) AS error_rate FROM observex.traces WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime

SELECT concat(service_name, ' · ', operation_name) AS op, avg(duration_ns) / 1e6 AS avg_ms FROM observex.traces WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND duration_ns >= toInt64(${min_duration_ms:csv}) * 1000000 GROUP BY op ORDER BY avg_ms DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Recent traces (click trace_id to open waterfall)

targets.rawSql: SELECT trace_id, service_name, operation_name, start_time, duration_ns / 1e6 AS duration_ms, status_code FROM observex.traces WHERE tenant_id = '${tenant}' AND (service_name IN (${service:sqlstring}) OR has(array(${service:sqlstring}), '__all__')) AND start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime AND duration_ns >= toInt64(${min_duration_ms:csv}) * 1000000 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 200
